title: Add Feature Flag
description: Add a feature flag to gradually roll out new functionality.
steps: Define flag name in config (e.g., FEATURE_MULTI_CURRENCY=false)
Create feature flag check utility: isEnabled(flagName)
Wrap new code path with flag check
Add flag to all environment configs (dev=true, staging=true, prod=false)
Test both paths: flag on and flag off
Deploy to prod with flag off
Enable for percentage of users or specific user IDs
Remove flag and old code path after full rollout
